_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: AeroX Verifier Bot
author: ayle@aerox
description: Discord bot that verifies YouTube channel subscriptions using Google Gemini AI vision. Admins upload a reference screenshot; the bot compares it against user uploads and assigns a role on match.

variables.name: Discord Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from discord.com/developers/applications → Bot → Token.

variables.name: Client ID
variables.description: Your Discord Application ID from discord.com/developers/applications → General Information.

variables.name: Gemini API Key
variables.description: Google Gemini API key from aistudio.google.com/app/apikey. Used for AI image verification.

variables.name: Database URL
variables.description: PostgreSQL connection string. e.g. postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname — Supabase, Railway, or any Postgres provider works.
